title: Rapid Breach Response - Set Incident Info
content:
This playbook is responsible for setting up the Rapid Breach Response Incident Info tab in the layout.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (MajorBreachesInvestigationandResponse, xsoar-supported).

Use cases: Malware.

Inputs — SourceOfIndicators: The source links for the indicators.; playbookDescription: The playbook description; countTotalIndicators: The total number of the indicators extracted..

Integrations/scripts used: Set, SetGridField.
